free_text: Triton-induced reactions on 12C
NAIG Nuclear Research Lab.
Central Research Lab.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
- Target-thickness is 0.019,0.040 mg/cm**2.
4MV electrostatic accelerator at NAIG
Nuclear Research Laboratory
The p-n junction type Si detectors of 0.3 micro
thin window layer were used to detect the emitted
alpha particles and the elastically scattered
tritons of low energy.
Lithium-drifted type Si detectors were used for
detection of the emitted protons and tritons of
high energy.
Optical potential parameter
See NRDF D2273 DATA,73 for detail.
